prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the hero food photo, transform it into a polished one-page restaurant branding board for a fried chicken and waffle-fries concept named Can Dende. Keep the yellow-table food photography as the visual anchor, but redesign the output as a clean square brand guideline sheet on a warm off-white background with a cheerful, retro, hand-drawn fast-casual identity. Add a large logo area in the upper left with bold vintage red lettering, a small illustrated fried-food mascot above it, and the tagline “FRIED CHICKEN & RUFFLES”. Build the page as a structured multi-panel layout with 9 sections: 1) logo/hero area, 2) brand story text block, 3) top-right hero photo crop from the reference, 4) color palette showing exactly 5 swatches with hex labels, 5) typography section with a large display sample of the brand name plus 3 text styles labeled header, subhead, and body, 6) patterns and textures section with exactly 4 playful assets: a yellow wavy stripe pattern, a red checker pattern, a handwritten phrase, and a small doodle heart, 7) iconography section with exactly 5 simple icons: chicken, bottle, fries, smiley face, and heart, 8) photography style section with a 2x2 grid of exactly 4 food-photo crops derived from the reference and matching close-up shots, plus a short bullet list of photography guidelines, and 9) brand applications section with exactly 5 mockups labeled signage, takeout packaging, menu design, social media, and staff apparel. Include a circular badge near the hero photo that says CRISPY GOOD MOOD. Use the palette yellow, tomato red, deep navy, leaf green, soft pink. Add a bottom banner with 2 sections titled “VOICE & VIBE” and a short brand summary paragraph. Overall feel: modern branding presentation, vibrant, appetizing, playful, sunny, editorial, highly legible, premium-but-fun.
